change.final_action: Promoted to default after primary gate, guard, prompt verifier, and 128K final check passed.
change.hot_path_dependencies: No torch or llama.cpp dependency added; resident packed weights and scratch allocation policy unchanged.
change.summary: Resident Q8_0 T16 WMMA prefill now uses TM32/TN16 for the 1024-row in=2048,out=2048 medium-square projection shape; 512/768-row square probes, large up-projection TN16 probes, output-projection TN16 probes, decode kernels, and residency stay unchanged.

checks.name: prompt verifier
checks.result: Stable IDs/logits sanity and flat memory; no torch/llama.cpp hot-path dependency; 512 and 4K prefill improved versus retained decode-policy-cache baseline, 4K decode improved, and 512 decode moved only within run noise.

notes: Claimed improvement is a prefill tile-policy promotion: 512/128 prefill 1958.536 -> 1965.587 tok/s and 4K/128 prefill 2292.684 -> 2293.367 tok/s, with 4K decode 114.991 -> 115.168 tok/s.
512/128 decode 127.263 -> 127.250 tok/s is treated as same-session noise, not a decode regression.
128K/128 uses 768-row low-memory chunks and is recorded as a final-promotion correctness/memory gate rather than the claimed speed target.
